# Contributing to Shop3

Thanks for collaborating! Quick guidelines to keep contributions smooth:

- Use a branch-per-PR. Branch name format: `feature/<short-desc>` or `fix/<short-desc>`.
- Open a Pull Request targeting `main` and include a clear description of changes.
- Add tests for new functionality and run existing tests before opening a PR.
- Follow existing code style. Run linters if present.
- Write descriptive commit messages and squash small fixup commits when merging.

If you're unsure about a change, open an issue first to discuss the design.
